member.summary: Provides utility functions for working with command line

member.summary: Represents the file fltering helper class

member.name: M:Xarial.XToolkit.FileSystemUtils.CombinePaths(System.String,System.String[])
member.summary: Combines the directory paths
member.remarks: This method works with relative path, including moving the upper folders via ..

member.name: M:Xarial.XToolkit.FileSystemUtils.GetTopFolders(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String})
member.summary: Excludes all sub level folders and only returns top level folders

member.name: M:Xarial.XToolkit.FileSystemUtils.IsInDirectory(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Checks if the specified path is in the other directory
member.returns: True of directory is within another directory

member.summary: Finds the relative path
member.param: Path to get relative path for

member.summary: Opens file explorer at the specified folder

member.summary: Opens file explorer and selects specified file

member.name: M:Xarial.XToolkit.FileSystemUtils.ReplaceIllegalRelativePathCharacters(System.String,System.Func{System.Char,System.Char})
member.summary: Replaces illegal characters in the relative file path (rooted path is not supported)

member.name: T:Xarial.XToolkit.Reflection.AppConfigBindingRedirectReferenceResolver
member.summary: Resolver for allowing to redirect assembly binding based on the .config files
member.remarks: This resolver can be useful for the plugin applications (.dlls) when the app.config files will not be considered for binding redirects It can also be useful when the binding redirects specified in the separate file which is not named after the application name (e.g. custom binding redirect without an automatic option)

member.name: T:Xarial.XToolkit.Reflection.AssemblyNameReferenceResolver
member.summary: Default assembly name resolver

member.name: T:Xarial.XToolkit.Reflection.AssemblyNameReferenceResolver.AssemblyInfo
member.summary: Assembly information

member.name: P:Xarial.XToolkit.Reflection.AssemblyNameReferenceResolver.AssemblyInfo.FilePath
member.summary: File path to the assembly

member.name: P:Xarial.XToolkit.Reflection.AssemblyNameReferenceResolver.AssemblyInfo.Name
member.summary: Assembly name

member.name: P:Xarial.XToolkit.Reflection.AssemblyNameReferenceResolver.Name
member.summary: Name of the resolver

member.summary: Default constructor

member.name: M:Xarial.XToolkit.Reflection.AssemblyNameReferenceResolver.GetCulture(System.Reflection.AssemblyName)
member.summary: Gets the culture of the assembly name

member.name: M:Xarial.XToolkit.Reflection.AssemblyNameReferenceResolver.GetPublicKeyToken(System.Reflection.AssemblyName)
member.summary: Gets the public key token from the assembly name
member.returns: Text version of public key token

member.name: M:Xarial.XToolkit.Reflection.AssemblyNameReferenceResolver.GetReplacementAssemblyName(System.Reflection.AssemblyName,System.Reflection.Assembly,System.String@,System.Boolean@)
member.summary: Provides the name of the assembly to replace for this missing reference
member.param: Assembly that requests this missing reference
True to search in sub-directories recursievely

member.name: M:Xarial.XToolkit.Reflection.AssemblyNameReferenceResolver.Match(System.Reflection.AssemblyName,System.Reflection.AssemblyName)
member.summary: Compares two assemblies to see if those match
member.returns: True if assembly names are matching
member.remarks: Use this method to override logic for matching (e.g. full match or only match by file name, version, public key token etc.)

member.name: M:Xarial.XToolkit.Reflection.AssemblyNameReferenceResolver.ResolveAmbiguity(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{Xarial.XToolkit.Reflection.AssemblyNameReferenceResolver.AssemblyInfo},System.Reflection.AssemblyName)
member.summary: Provides the assembly to use if multiple options available

member.name: M:Xarial.XToolkit.Reflection.AssemblyNameReferenceResolver.ProvideProbeAssemblyFilePaths(System.String,System.Reflection.AssemblyName)
member.summary: Returnes probe assemly file paths
member.returns: Possible file paths of the assembly file

member.name: M:Xarial.XToolkit.Reflection.Lambda.InvokeGenericMethod(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Action},System.Type[])
member.summary: Invokes generic method by supplying the type arguments
member.remarks: Method body within expression must only contain constant values or variables (no expression). Use cast to match the parameter type (actual cast wil lnot be called)

member.name: M:Xarial.XToolkit.Reflection.TypeExtension.IsAssignableToGenericType(System.Type,System.Type)
member.summary: Checks if this type can be assigned to the generic type
member.returns: True if this type can be assigned to generic type

member.name: M:Xarial.XToolkit.Reflection.TypeExtension.GetMethodWithGenericParameters(System.Type,System.String,System.Type[],System.Reflection.BindingFlags)
member.summary: Finds the method from the type if
member.returns: Method or null if not found
member.remarks: This method is similar to , but allowing to specify the generic types definitions

member.name: M:Xarial.XToolkit.Reporting.ExceptionExtension.ParseUserError(System.Exception,System.String@,System.String,System.Type[])
member.summary: Parses the exception error and extract user visible error of
member.param: Text of generic error if no user error found
Additional types to treat as user exception

member.summary: Error with user friendly description

member.summary: Service allows to parse expression into the

member.name: M:Xarial.XToolkit.Services.Expressions.IExpressionParser.Parse(System.String)
member.summary: Parses tokens from the expression

member.name: M:Xarial.XToolkit.Services.Expressions.IExpressionParser.CreateExpression(Xarial.XToolkit.Services.Expressions.IExpressionToken)
member.summary: Creates expression from the token

member.name: T:Xarial.XToolkit.Services.Expressions.ExpressionParser
member.summary: Default expression parses allows to specifying chars for the start and end tags of the variable, arguments and escape symbol

member.name: T:Xarial.XToolkit.Services.Expressions.ExpressionParser.ParsingState
member.summary: Represents the information about the currently parsing token

member.name: P:Xarial.XToolkit.Services.Expressions.ExpressionParser.ParsingState.VariableNestedTokens
member.summary: List of tokens collected for the current variables=

member.name: P:Xarial.XToolkit.Services.Expressions.ExpressionParser.ParsingState.TokenType
member.summary: Type of current token or null if not yet set

member.name: P:Xarial.XToolkit.Services.Expressions.ExpressionParser.ParsingState.TokenContent
member.summary: Content of the current token

member.name: P:Xarial.XToolkit.Services.Expressions.ExpressionParser.ParsingState.TokenNameSpaceBuffer
member.summary: Buffer of spaces from the current variable name
member.remarks: This is used to allow space in variable name but atuomatically trim the variable name and avoid excessive Trim operation. This buffer wil lonly be added if another non empty char is identified in the variable name, e.g. this space buffer is between words of the variable name

member.name: P:Xarial.XToolkit.Services.Expressions.ExpressionParser.ParsingState.CharProtected
member.summary: Sets if the next char is protected and has to be considered as literal (even if it is a special symbol)

member.name: P:Xarial.XToolkit.Services.Expressions.ExpressionParser.ParsingState.IsVariableNameParsed
member.summary: Indicates that the variable name was parsed (e.g. first argument encountered). This is used to handle the case where the text within variable appears after the arguments

member.name: T:Xarial.XToolkit.Services.Expressions.IExpressionSolver`1
member.summary: Solves the expression token with context

member.name: M:Xarial.XToolkit.Services.Expressions.IExpressionSolver`1.Solve(Xarial.XToolkit.Services.Expressions.IExpressionToken,`0)
member.summary: Replaces the expression token with values

member.summary: Compares the content of 2 expression tokens
member.returns: True if content is the same
